message:
fix(mux): fix transfer resume, session cleanup, and paste upload

- Fix segfault: session use-after-free in pushDownloadFiles and
  buildFileListAndSendThread by centralizing cleanup in defers
  with mutex-protected conn.user_data access
- Fix segfault: sendDryRunReport double-free by removing its
  removeSession call (defer handles it)
- Fix download resume ignoring useGitignore/excludes: persist
  transfer options in OPFS metadata, include flags+excludes in
  TRANSFER_RESUME protocol, parse and apply on server
- Fix OPFS cleanup: cancelTransfer now always deletes metadata
  even after onDisconnect clears activeTransfers; cleanup-temp
  handler now removes OPFS temp files (was only clearing memory)
- Fix memory leak on shutdown: track buildFileListAndSendThread
  for join (was detached), add is_active early-abort in
  walkDirectory/walkDirectoryNoHash, free skipped file entries
  during resume filter
- Fix folder paste upload: use getAsFileSystemHandle() in paste
  handler to detect directories (matching drop handler pattern)
- Fix missing serverPath in upload pendingTransfer
- Add build_options module for mux benchmark gating
